source: documents/clean-water-1973-scan.pdf (scanned booklet: 1973 Detroit Metro Water Department, cover + inside cover)
note: Not a data-table document. p1 = a full-bleed sunset photo with a script-font title; p2 = a two-column roster of officials + the general manager. No tables, no formulas. Tests OCR fidelity of names / script-font title + two-column reading order (no interleaving) + cover photo extraction. A silent error here = a surname OCR'd into a plausible-looking wrong spelling.

headings._desc: Script-font 'Clean Water' / 'A New Day...', plus DETROIT METRO WATER DEPARTMENT, COMMON COUNCIL, BOARD OF WATER COMMISSIONERS, GERALD J. REMUS.

anchors._desc: Names / date / photo caption must survive verbatim and correctly spelled. The script-font title carries the highest OCR risk.

reading_order._desc: The p2 two-column roster: read the full left column COMMON COUNCIL (8 people) before the right column BOARD (7 people); do not interleave line by line. GERALD J. REMUS is a centered block after both columns. The footer (Cover Photo left / Litho right) must not be merged into one line.

image.truth: full-bleed cover sunset photo (Lake St. Clair) with the script-font title overprinted on it
